failed_rules.message: Delayed Financing is not an allowed loan purpose for 2nd Lien - FAIL
US Citizens are not eligible for Select ITIN program.
Occupancy 'Investment Property' not eligible. Available: Primary Residence
Super Jumbo program only available for Primary (Owner Occupied) occupancy - Non-Owner Occupied not eligible
US Citizens are not eligible for Foreign National program - FAIL
DSCR Multi (5-8 Units): Only Residential 5-8 Units and Mixed Use 2-8 Units are eligible
Delayed Financing is not an allowed loan purpose for Investor DSCR No Ratio - FAIL

specifications: Must show original purchase date within 6 months of current transaction
Must confirm no mortgage financing was used to acquire subject property OR show only short-term/hard money financing
Must show original purchase price paid by borrower
Must document arm's-length transaction with unrelated seller
If short-term/hard money loan was used, copy of the note is required to verify terms

reasons_needed.reason: Delayed Financing requires settlement statement from original purchase confirming transaction details
Must verify borrower's initial investment to establish maximum allowable loan amount
Required to confirm original transaction was arm's-length per Delayed Financing rules

specifications: Must document source of all funds used for original property acquisition
Acceptable sources: bank statements, personal loan documents, HELOC/loan on another property
Must show funds available prior to original purchase date
If HELOC or loan secured by other property was used, new loan proceeds must pay off/pay down that loan
Gift funds used for original purchase may NOT be reimbursed with new loan proceeds

reasons_needed.reason: Delayed Financing requires documentation of source of funds used for original purchase
New loan amount limited to borrower's actual documented initial investment
Must verify no gift fund reimbursement and proper payoff of acquisition financing

specifications: Must be a tri-merge credit report or Residential Mortgage Credit Report (RMCR) from Experian, TransUnion, and Equifax
Must include all borrowers on the loan
Must display credit scores from all three bureaus
Must show complete tradeline details including payment history, balances, and account status
Must include public records search for each city borrower resided in last 2 years
Must show inquiries, collections, charge-offs, disputes, and alerts if applicable
Must be dated within 120 days of note date
Must verify Social Security Number for all borrowers
reasons_needed: Credit score of 800 must be verified to confirm DSCR program eligibility
Tradeline requirements must be reviewed (3 tradelines 12+ months or 2 tradelines 24+ months)
Housing history and mortgage payment history must be verified
Public records must be searched to identify any undisclosed credit events
Required per NQM guidelines for all borrowers on the loan

specifications: Must be FNMA Form 1007 Single Family Comparable Rent Schedule
Must identify the subject property address matching the loan file
Must include appraiser's opinion of market rent for the subject property
Must be completed by the licensed appraiser as part of the appraisal package
Must reflect current lease terms if the property is tenant-occupied
Market rent opinion must account for the property type and local rental market conditions
reasons_needed: DSCR ratio calculation requires gross rental income from Form 1007 to compute DSCR = Gross Rental Income / PITIA
Investor DSCR program requires 1007/1025 for all refinance transactions to establish market rent
For Delayed Financing refinance, 1007 validates rental income used in DSCR qualification
Guideline states: 'Refinance: FNMA 1007/1025 required' for Long Term Rentals on DSCR
document_requests.guideline_reference: DSCR Guidelines - Long Term Rentals, Rental Income Requirements

specifications: Must be a fully executed lease agreement for the subject property
Must identify the subject property address
Must identify tenant name(s) and lease term dates
Must show monthly rental amount
Must have at least 1 month remaining at time of closing, OR if month-to-month, provide signed extension letter or evidence of rental continuance
Must be signed by both landlord/property owner and tenant(s)
Single room occupancy or boarder leases are not permitted
reasons_needed: DSCR refinance transactions require the property to be leased - vacant property not eligible unless Delayed Financing exception applies
Lease agreement validates tenant occupancy and rental income being received
Guideline states: 'Executed lease with no less than 1 month remaining at the time of closing for all units in the subject property'
For Delayed Financing, if property is currently leased, lease documentation supports DSCR calculation
If property is vacant under Delayed Financing exception, evidence property is listed for rent required instead
document_requests.guideline_reference: DSCR Guidelines - Long Term Rentals, Lease and Occupancy Requirements
document_requests.conditional_note: If property is currently vacant under Delayed Financing exception, provide evidence property is listed for rent in lieu of executed lease

specifications: Must provide rent loss/rental income coverage for the subject property
Coverage amount must equal at least 6 months of PITIA (Principal, Interest, Taxes, Insurance, Association dues)
Policy must name the subject property address
Blanket policies covering the subject property are eligible if they meet coverage requirements
Must be in effect at time of closing
Must provide rent loss coverage for subject investment property
Must name subject property address
Must be current and effective through closing and beyond
Blanket policies covering the subject property are eligible
Must include policy number, coverage limits, and effective dates
reasons_needed: DSCR program requires Rent Loss Insurance to protect against income loss if property becomes uninhabitable or unrentable
Guideline states: 'Rent Loss Insurance for the subject property is required and must equal at least 6 months of PITIA'
Coverage protects lender's collateral and income stream used for DSCR qualification
Required for Investor DSCR program per program matrix requirements
Rent Loss Insurance is required for all DSCR loans per NQMF Investor DSCR guidelines
Coverage must equal minimum 6 months PITIA as specified in program requirements
Protects lender interest in rental income stream supporting DSCR qualification

specifications: Must cover most recent 2 months
Must include all pages of each statement
Must show borrower name as account holder
Must show financial institution name
Must show account number (full or masked)
Must show beginning and ending balances for each month
Must show complete transaction history
Must be dated within 90 days of note date
Statements for all accounts being used for funds to close and reserves
reasons_needed: Required to verify sufficient funds for closing costs and prepaid items
Required to verify reserves for investment property DSCR loan
Assets must be dated within 90 days of note date per guideline
Account ownership must be confirmed to match borrower
Transaction history needed to identify any large deposits requiring sourcing
document_requests.guideline_reference: ASSETS - Loan files must evidence sufficient funds from acceptable sources for closing costs, prepaid items, and applicable reserves

specifications: Must be FNMA Form 1004 (Uniform Residential Appraisal Report) for single-family residence
Must identify subject property address matching loan file
Must identify property type as SFR and confirm 1-unit count
Must show appraised value supporting 65% LTV calculation
Must be dated within 120 days of Note date; if older, Appraisal Update (1004D) required before 365 days
Must include all pages, addenda, and exhibits
Must include street map showing subject and all comparables
Must include exterior building sketch with dimensions and gross living area calculation
Must include color photographs: front, rear, street view, kitchen, all bathrooms, main living area
Must include interior photos of any physical deterioration or renovations
Must confirm property condition is Average or better (C4 or better; C5/C6 not acceptable)
Must confirm no health or safety issues, structural deferred maintenance, or fair/poor ratings
Must confirm property meets minimum standards: year-round use, heated, full kitchen and bathroom, minimum 400 sqft
Must include analysis of any sales/transfers of subject in past 3 years (Delayed Financing relevance)
Must include comparable sales and appraiser certification
Must disclose any adverse conditions, repairs required, or environmental hazards
Must include appraiser's license/certification number
Must be submitted in MISMO XML format with color photos
reasons_needed: Collateral valuation is required for all loan transactions per NQMF guidelines
LTV/CLTV eligibility at 65% depends on appraised value confirmation
Property type and unit count affect DSCR program eligibility
Property condition must be verified for DSCR properties (expected free of deferred maintenance)
Investment property requires property eligibility confirmation
Subject property identity must be consistent across the loan file
Delayed Financing requires analysis of recent acquisition and value support

specifications: Must be issued by a licensed title insurer qualified in California
Must identify all vested owners matching borrower Aubrey Banaga
Must identify subject property by full address and legal description
Must include 24-month chain of title history per NQMF guidelines
Must disclose all liens, judgments, easements, and title exceptions
Must show title insurer name and effective date
Must be dated within 90 days of closing
Must indicate final policy will be issued on ALTA 2006 standard form
Must show clear path to first lien position for new mortgage
reasons_needed: NQMF guidelines require all files contain 24-month title history from acceptable source
Title must confirm ownership and vesting align with loan file for Aubrey Banaga
Lien position verification required - must ensure first lien position for new mortgage
Title exceptions must be reviewed against allowable exceptions per NQMF guidelines
Any judgments or liens affecting title must be identified for payoff or resolution at closing
Transfer history must be reviewed for inconsistencies or flipping activity per guidelines

specifications: Must be recorded deed showing current ownership of subject property
Must identify grantor(s) and grantee(s) with full legal names
Must show vesting name matching borrower Aubrey Banaga
Must include complete legal description of subject property
Must show recording information (date, book, page, instrument number)
Must reflect manner of title holding (sole ownership, joint tenants, etc.)
reasons_needed: NQMF guidelines require vesting verification - final title policy vesting must reflect borrower names
Vesting must be verified to confirm borrower has legal authority to encumber property
Ownership confirmation required to ensure borrower on loan matches title holder
Legal description from deed must match title commitment and appraisal
Required to verify chain of title and ownership transfer for Delayed Financing transaction

specifications: Must identify creditor/servicer name and contact information
Must include loan/account number for existing lien
Must show current payoff amount including principal, interest, and fees
Must show good-through date (payoff valid date)
Must include per diem interest amount
Must identify subject property address securing the existing lien
Must be dated within 30 days of closing
Must include wire instructions for payoff disbursement
reasons_needed: Delayed Financing refinance requires payoff of any existing liens to establish first lien position
NQMF guidelines require existing liens be paid or subordinated for refinance transactions
Payoff amount required to calculate accurate funds to close and loan proceeds
Servicer verification needed to ensure payoff reaches correct creditor
Per diem required to calculate final payoff amount at closing date
Title must ensure clear first lien position after existing debt payoff

specifications: Must be current and unexpired government-issued photo identification
Must show borrower full legal name matching loan application
Acceptable forms: Driver's License, Passport, State ID, or Military ID
Must be legible with clear photo visible

reasons_needed.reason: Borrower identity verification is required for all loan transactions
Name on ID must match loan application, title, and authorization documents

specifications: Must be fully executed with borrower signature and date
Must include correct borrower name, SSN, and current address
Must specify tax years for transcript authorization (most recent 2 years minimum)
Must match subject property address for investment property

reasons_needed.reason: IRS tax transcript authorization is required per FULL DOCUMENTATION guidelines
Required for verification of income sources and tax filing status

specifications: Must identify all borrowers by legal name
Must identify subject property address
Must declare property is for business/investment purpose only
Must declare property will not be occupied by borrower, any member of borrower's LLC, or any family member
Must be signed and dated by all borrowers
Must include occupancy certification component per NQMF Business Purpose & Occupancy Affidavit form
Must be consistent with 1003 occupancy declaration and appraisal report
Must confirm non-TRID transaction status for DSCR loan
reasons_needed: Business Purpose & Occupancy Affidavit is required on all Business Purpose loans per NQMF guidelines
Investment properties and all DSCR loans must be Business Purpose and processed as non-TRID transactions
Confirms borrower representation that property will not be owner-occupied
Required for investor DSCR program compliance and non-TRID designation
Documents borrower's intent and commitment to business purpose use

specifications: Must cover most recent 12 months of payment history
Must identify borrower name and property address
Must show each monthly payment status (current, 30-day late, 60-day late, etc.)
Must be sourced from credit report or loan servicer statement
Must support 0x30x12 payment history requirement if applicable
Must identify all mortgages including subject property and any other owned properties
reasons_needed: Borrower owns investment property indicating existing mortgage obligations
Housing history verification required per NQM guidelines for all programs
Mortgage lates within lookback period may affect eligibility or pricing
12-month 0x30 housing history may serve as tradeline qualification
Required to verify no housing events (120+ day late payments) exist
conditions: If mortgage history is fully reflected on tri-merge credit report with 0x30x12 status, separate verification may not be required

specifications: Must show sufficient verified liquid asset balance to cover required reserve months
Must identify acceptable asset source (checking, savings, money market)
Must show clear account ownership matching borrower name
Must support required months of PITIA based on DSCR investment property requirements
Reserve calculation must be supported by verified bank statement balances
If PITIA amount not yet finalized, estimated reserves should cover 6 months minimum for investment property
reasons_needed: Investment property loans typically require reserves based on property type and risk factors
DSCR program may have specific reserve requirements for non-owner occupied properties
Reserve calculation must be supported by documented verified liquid assets
Ensures borrower has financial cushion beyond funds needed at closing
document_requests.guideline_reference: ASSETS - Sufficient funds from acceptable sources for applicable reserves

specifications: Must be submitted through UCDP (Uniform Collateral Data Portal)
SSR Score must be 2.5 or less for acceptable appraisal review
Must identify subject property and match appraisal report
Must include submission status and any warnings or hard stops
Must be current and associated with the appraisal being used for underwriting
reasons_needed: Appraisal Review Process requires secondary product to support appraisal value
SSR Score of 2.5 or less is required per NQMF Appraisal Review Process guidelines
UCDP submission validates appraisal data quality and consistency

specifications: Must be a Flood Certificate provided by FEMA-certified vendor
Must identify subject property address
Must clearly indicate flood zone designation
Must show whether property is in Special Flood Hazard Area (SFHA) Zone A or V
Must indicate whether community participates in NFIP (National Flood Insurance Program)
Must show FEMA Map number and effective date
Must reconcile with flood zone indicated in appraisal report
reasons_needed: Flood zone determination is required per NQMF guidelines to establish flood insurance requirements
Properties in Flood Zone A or V require flood insurance and community NFIP participation
California properties may be in various flood zones requiring verification
Appraisal flood zone must be validated against official flood certificate

specifications: Must be hazard insurance policy protecting against fire and standard extended coverage perils
Extended coverage must include: wind, civil commotion, smoke, hail, aircraft, vehicle, explosion
Coverage must provide claims settlement on replacement cost basis (actual cash value not acceptable)
Policy must name all persons holding title to subject property as named insured
Must include standard or union mortgagee clause (loss payable clause not acceptable)
Mortgagee clause must list NQM Funding, LLC (or assignee) with correct address
Policy must be effective for at least 60 days after funding date
Evidence must include: policy number, loan number, insurance company name, agent information
Must show effective/expiration dates, premium amount, coverage amounts, and deductible
Policy must require insurer to notify mortgagee in writing before cancellation
Property address must match note/security instrument
reasons_needed: Hazard insurance is required for all properties to protect collateral
Investment property requires proper named insured and mortgagee clause documentation
Replacement cost coverage is required per NQMF guidelines
Mortgagee protection ensures lender interest in collateral

specifications: Must be FNMA Form 3170 (1-4 Family Rider / Assignment of Rents)
Must identify subject investment property
Must be executed by all borrowers on title
Must assign rents to lender as additional security
Must be recorded with the security instrument
reasons_needed: 1-4 Family Rider (Assignment of Rents) is required for all Investment Properties per NQMF appraisal requirements
Provides lender with security interest in rental income
Required for DSCR loan where rental income is the qualifying factor

specifications: Must identify all borrowers by legal name
Must identify subject property address
Must contain borrower agreement to furnish current lease agreements upon request
Must acknowledge obligation to provide lease documentation to lender and successors/assigns
Must be signed and dated by all borrowers
NQMF Compliance Agreement – DSCR Loans form or equivalent acceptable
reasons_needed: Compliance Agreement – DSCR Loans or equivalent form is required per NQMF guidelines
Borrower agreement to furnish lease agreements ensures ongoing compliance monitoring capability
Required documentation for all DSCR loan programs
Establishes borrower obligation for post-closing rental documentation as needed
